name: io.github.kuyazee/artifacts
title: Artifacts
description: Self-hosted artifact publishing: agents POST HTML/JSX/Markdown/zip sites and get an unguessable public URL on your own domain

environmentVariables.name: ARTIFACTS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token required for all writes and the MCP endpoint

environmentVariables.name: BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Public origin used in returned artifact URLs (e.g. https://artifacts.example.com)
